title: Claim status call captures pending outcome
success_criteria: The assistant keeps the conversation focused on claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-PENDING.
The assistant confirms the payer reports the claim as pending review.
The assistant captures the expected follow-up timing and payer reference.
The assistant does not describe the claim as paid or denied.

criteria: The transcript reaches a pending-status outcome for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-PENDING.
The assistant accurately treats pending review as the final available status.
The assistant captures follow-up timing and reference REF-PENDING-CHARLIE.
The assistant does not fabricate adjudication outcome.
The assistant does not request unnecessary patient details.
The assistant waits through the representative lookup without changing topics.
Hold or wait turns do not cause loss of the claim reference.
The assistant summarizes pending status, follow-up timing, and reference.
The assistant closes without requesting escalation after sufficient information is captured.

notes: Synthetic pending-claim fixture. No real payer or patient data.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Hello, this is Chris from Cosentus checking status for claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-PENDING.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: Give me a moment while I review that claim.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Sure, I will hold for the status on CLAIM-EXAMPLE-PENDING.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: It is pending review. Please allow two business days. The reference is REF-PENDING-CHARLIE.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thank you. I have the claim as pending review, follow-up in two business days, reference REF-PENDING-CHARLIE.
